name: Q-11 PR with empty --adrs-csv scores zero on the adr_coverage component
command: printf '%s' '{"commit":"abc"}' > manifest.json && : > drift.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-quality-scorecard.sh" --pr-sha abc --manifest manifest.json --adrs-csv '' --drift-findings drift.jsonl --invocations-count 1 --format json > out.json && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.components.adr_coverage===0?0:1)' && echo zero 1>&2
